title: Wordle
description: A Minecraft GUI minigame based on Wordle from Josh Wardle
body:
Wordle in Minecraft Inventory (GUI)

Inventory keyboard client-side
Multiple data storage (FLAT FILE / MYSQL)
Word restart every day!

99.99% configurable!
ModelData support (for texturepacks!)

Supported Spigot versions: 1.18.2, 1.18.1, 1.17.1, 1.16.5, 1.12.2

Showcase:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j0FvoKINggg
